candidate_definitions.text: ACM MM 2021: 'Is Someone Speaking? Exploring Long-term Temporal Features for Audio-visual Active Speaker Detection'

This repository contains the code for our ACM MM 2021 paper (oral), TalkNet, an active speaker detection model to detect 'whether the face in the screen is speaking or not?'. [[Paper](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2107.06592.pdf)] [[Video_English](https://youtu.be/C6bpAgI9zxE)] [[Video_…
